jobs.title: Business Development Representative
jobs.content: <p><strong>About Acryl Data</strong></p><p>Acryl Data, the steward of the open-source DataHub project, is hiring a Business Development Representative to scale enterprise data-catalog adoption.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Platform Engineer
jobs.content: <p>Build & operate Acryl DataHub Cloud&rsquo;s metadata-streaming infrastructure on Kubernetes.</p>

jobs.title: Customer Success Manager
jobs.content: <p>Drive Acryl DataHub adoption across enterprise data-platform & analytics teams.</p>
